completedItems: Children page now lists, filters, creates, edits, archives and restores through the E01 API client.
Children archive/restore uses soft archive metadata and default active-only listing.
Teacher management MVP added at /admin/teachers with list, detail, create, edit, class assignment, archive and restore.
Teacher management APIs are director-only and return the E01 uniform 403 forbidden_scope envelope for teachers and parents.
Child access remains enforced through lib/server/scope.ts for parent-owned children, teacher class children and director institution children.
Child and teacher PATCH paths now sanitize immutable/archive fields instead of trusting request bodies.
Playwright/API coverage added for CRUD, refresh persistence, archive/restore visibility and forbidden childId/teacherId access.
E02 documentation, implementation log and product decisions were updated without editing IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md.
remainingItems: C21-007 remains a production data-model risk: classId, teacherId, parentId and childId relationships still use the E01 demo/process-local repository rather than a durable database schema.
Teacher account invitation, phone/account status and login enable-disable controls remain outside the E02 MVP.
Health, diet and growth record UI CRUD migration remains for E03/E04/E05/E06 scope; E02 only uses records API for attendance persistence on /children.

checks.lint: passed: npm run lint (0 errors; 2 unrelated warnings in app/parent/agent/page.tsx and components/communication/AttachmentMediaPicker.tsx)
checks.featureSmoke: passed: FEATURE_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3330 FEATURE_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 npm run feature:smoke (17/17); E02专项 Playwright 4/4 passed

risks: Standalone npm run typecheck still reports unrelated current AI/OCR/ASR provider type errors in dirty files outside E02 scope; npm run build and required checks passed.
E02 remains on the E01 demo/process-local repository, so production database durability is still tracked under C21-007.
notes: A temporary next start server was launched from the successful production build at http://127.0.0.1:3330 because .next/dev/lock existed and the Playwright feature config would otherwise skip starting a server. The server was stopped after tests.
